_comment: Resources page copy — every heading, paragraph, card, and image on the Resources page (src/pages/resources.astro). Edit here or via the CMS; the page layout and styles stay in the .astro file.

seo.title: Resources · Sakyadhita
seo.description: 35+ years of newsletters, scholarship, brochures, member stories, and translations from Sakyadhita — free and open to all.

hero.heading: A library built by Buddhist women, for Buddhist women
hero.lede: 35+ years of newsletters, scholarship, brochures, member stories, and translations — free and open to all.

libraryCards.title: Newsletter Archive

libraryCards.text: Books, bibliographies, scholarly articles, and multilingual brochures in 9 languages.

libraryCards.text: Images, art, music, ritual, and architecture documenting Buddhist women across cultures and centuries.
